document_metadata.title: Free sports physicals will be offered on August 5 in Boonville
document_metadata.first_words: Free sports physicals for all middle school and high school students will be offered at Mizzou Therapy Services in Boonville on Friday, August 5th 2022 from 2-4 p.m. The address is 1420 W. Ashley Road, Boonville, MO 65233. Call 660-882-3420 for an appointment. Prairie Home fall sports begin on August 8th. Vacation Bible School is being hosted by the Prairie Home First Baptist Church this year. It is a one night event on Wednesday August 3rd, 2022 from 6-830 P.M.. Ages 4 through 5th grade completion are welcome. Supper is provided. The Prairie Home First Baptist Church

content_metadata.document_title_txt: Free sports physicals will be offered on August 5 in Boonville

chunks.content_original:
Prairie Home School will start pre-registration next week. Parents may pre-register from 8A.M.-5P.M. on Monday, August 8th, Tuesday, August 9th, and Wednesday, August 10th. Paperwork that needs to be completed at pre-registration includes: Student Information Form Student Medical Form Free & Reduced Lunch Information and Application Internet Use Policy The information packet will also include:

August Breakfast and Lunch Menus

Fall Athletic Practice and Game Schedules

2022-2023 School Calendar Snow Routes/ Bus Rider Request

Supply List

Asbestos Information

Parent Portal Information

Student Handbook 7-12

Prairie Home School has some new employees this year including:

Superintendent: Mr. Jordan Hoecker

Counselor: Mrs. Diana Norris

1st Grade: Mrs. Paige Miller

2nd Grade: Mrs. Kelsey Blank

English: Mrs. Erin Small

SPED: Mrs. Angie Shane

Paraprofessional: Mrs. Meagan Alpers

Paraprofessional: Mrs. Regina Baepler

Maintenance/Head Custodian: Mr. Randy Ray Custodian: Mr. James Porterfield

chunks.content_original:
**Kate Porterfield** Prairie Home Correspondent

Free sports physicals for all middle school and high school students will be offered at Mizzou Therapy Services in Boonville on Friday, August 5th 2022 from 2-4 p.m.

The address is 1420 W. Ashley Road, Boonville, MO 65233. Call 660-882-3420 for an appointment.

Prairie Home fall sports begin on August 8th.

Vacation Bible School is being hosted by the Prairie Home First Baptist Church this year. It is a one night event on Wednesday August 3rd, 2022 from 6-830 P.M.. Ages 4 through 5th grade completion are welcome. Supper is provided. The Prairie Home First Baptist Church is located at 418 Main Street, Prairie Home, MO 65068. This year’s theme is “Power Up With Jesus.”

markdown_content:
**Kate Porterfield** Prairie Home Correspondent

Free sports physicals for all middle school and high school students will be offered at Mizzou Therapy Services in Boonville on Friday, August 5th 2022 from 2-4 p.m.

The address is 1420 W. Ashley Road, Boonville, MO 65233. Call 660-882-3420 for an appointment.

Prairie Home fall sports begin on August 8th.

Vacation Bible School is being hosted by the Prairie Home First Baptist Church this year. It is a one night event on Wednesday August 3rd, 2022 from 6-830 P.M.. Ages 4 through 5th grade completion are welcome. Supper is provided. The Prairie Home First Baptist Church is located at 418 Main Street, Prairie Home, MO 65068. This year’s theme is “Power Up With Jesus.”

Prairie Home School will start pre-registration next week. Parents may pre-register from 8A.M.-5P.M. on Monday, August 8th, Tuesday, August 9th, and Wednesday, August 10th. Paperwork that needs to be completed at pre-registration includes: Student Information Form Student Medical Form Free & Reduced Lunch Information and Application Internet Use Policy The information packet will also include:

August Breakfast and Lunch Menus

Fall Athletic Practice and Game Schedules

2022-2023 School Calendar Snow Routes/ Bus Rider Request

Supply List

Asbestos Information

Parent Portal Information

Student Handbook 7-12

Prairie Home School has some new employees this year including:

Superintendent: Mr. Jordan Hoecker

Counselor: Mrs. Diana Norris

1st Grade: Mrs. Paige Miller

2nd Grade: Mrs. Kelsey Blank

English: Mrs. Erin Small

SPED: Mrs. Angie Shane

Paraprofessional: Mrs. Meagan Alpers

Paraprofessional: Mrs. Regina Baepler

Maintenance/Head Custodian: Mr. Randy Ray Custodian: Mr. James Porterfield
